name: Belvedere Pickleball Center at Ironclad Golf & Beer Garden
description: Come play pickleball at Belvedere Pickleball Center at Ironclad Golf & Beer Garden in Hampstead, NC! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — Daily fee of $10 available for non-members.

name: Surf City Parks And Rec Community Center
description: Surf City Parks And Rec Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Surf City, NC. There are 4 courts. 1 is outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Topsail Island Pickleball Club
description: Topsail Island Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Holly Ridge, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.
